content.speakerText: Thanks for a thoughtful presentation. We'll deliberate and get back to you by Friday.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你精彩的陈述，我们会讨论并在周五前通知结果。

options.text: Thank you so much for your insightful questions—I really appreciate the time and feedback.
Cool, thanks! I’ll check my email Friday.
Okay, I guess that’s it then.
I hope you liked it. Can I get a pass now?

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对委员会时间和反馈的真诚感谢，符合正式学术场合的礼仪。选项2过于随意，缺乏尊重；选项3消极被动，显得冷漠；选项4直接索要结果，不合时宜且不礼貌。

content.speakerText: You did well. Keep up the good work.

options.text: Thank you, Professor. I’m committed to refining this work further.
Thanks! I’m gonna ace the next one!
Yeah, I think I did okay.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了谦逊与进取态度，使用正式称呼和学术语言。选项2使用口语化表达（'gonna'）且带有自夸语气；选项3过于消极，缺乏感激；选项4急于追问结果，不合时宜。

content.speakerText: Your defense was clear and well-structured. We’re pleased with your progress.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的答辩清晰有条理，我们对你的进展感到满意。

options.text: Thank you for your encouragement. I’m grateful for your guidance and will continue to improve.
I guess I didn’t mess up too badly.
Can I get a copy of the evaluation sheet?

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了感激与继续努力的承诺，语气专业得体。选项2直接索要结果，缺乏礼貌；选项3使用自贬式表达，不符合学术礼仪；选项4偏离主题，未回应赞美。

content.template: Thank you so much for your insightful questions—I really appreciate the time and ______.
content.hint: 委员会提供的是建设性意见，这个名词常用于学术评价语境。
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：provide/give feedback（提供反馈）

content.template: Thank you, Professor. I’m committed to ______ this work further.
content.hint: 在学术语境中，'refining' 表示对研究进行细致优化，比 'fixing' 更正式。
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：refine work（完善研究）

content.template: I truly appreciate your ______ and constructive suggestions during the defense.
content.hint: 在学术答辩后，感谢委员会的指导是标准表达。

content.speakerText: Thanks for a thoughtful presentation. We'll deliberate and get back to you by Friday.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你精彩的陈述，我们会讨论并在周五前通知结果。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much for your insightful questions—I really appreciate the time and feedback.
I’m truly grateful for your feedback and look forward to hearing from you by Friday.
Thank you for your thoughtful comments. I appreciate the opportunity to present and will await your decision.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达感谢并回应委员会的后续安排
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无口语化错误
表达自然度：语气正式、谦逊，符合学术场景
关键词覆盖：使用了 'feedback', 'appreciate', 'time', 'look forward to' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You did well. Keep up the good work.
expectedAnswers: Thank you, Professor. I’m committed to refining this work further.
I appreciate your encouragement and will continue to develop this research with rigor.
Thanks for the feedback—I’ll build on this foundation in my next steps.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应鼓励并表达持续努力的意愿
语言准确性：避免口语缩略词（如 'gonna', 'cool'），使用正式表达
表达自然度：语气谦逊而不卑微，符合师生对话语境
关键词覆盖：使用了 'appreciate', 'refining', 'continue', 'research' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Your defense was clear and well-structured. We’re pleased with your progress.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的答辩清晰有条理，我们对你的进展感到满意。
expectedAnswers: Thank you for your encouragement. I’m grateful for your guidance and will continue to improve.
I’m honored by your positive feedback and will strive to uphold these standards in my future work.
Thank you for recognizing my efforts—I value your insights and will incorporate them into my next revisions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚感谢并回应积极评价
语言准确性：使用高级词汇和完整句式，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气专业、有学术风范，不夸张也不敷衍
关键词覆盖：使用了 'guidance', 'encouragement', 'improve', 'insights', 'revisions' 等学术关键词
